script_to_test_coverage_summary.coverage_note: Design includes stub-level test mapping for each script.

findings.summary: load_jira_env wrapper self-invokes after sourcing jira-cli env helpers, creating a recursive naming collision.
findings.recommended_fix: Remove the function-name collision: rename the local wrapper or call the shared loader directly so Jira env initialization is deterministic and non-recursive.

findings.summary: Spawn template references an external fallback skill path outside repository conventions.
findings.recommended_fix: Use only repository-local skill paths in the template, or define deterministic fallback checks and failure handling.

findings.summary: run.json initialization omits jira_published_at even though later phases and schema docs treat it as a first-class field.
findings.recommended_fix: Initialize jira_published_at to null in init_run_json for full schema/runtime alignment.

required_fixes: Fix load_jira_env recursion by removing local/shared function-name collision.
Use deterministic repository-local skill pathing in spawn task instructions.
Initialize jira_published_at in init_run_json to match documented schema.
